title: anesis #0425
definition:
1) a loosening, relaxing
    1a) spoken of a more tolerable condition in captivity, to be held
        in less vigorous confinement
    1b) relief, rest, from persecutions

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5810\\
                        dan \\5922\\
